name: moscap_axisym_2d
description: Axisymmetric (cylindrical) 2D MOS capacitor reproducing Hu Fig. 5-18 (low-frequency vs. high-frequency C-V split). Solves on the meridian half-plane (r, z) with rotational symmetry about the z-axis. P-type Si body (5 um), N_a = 5e16 cm^-3; SiO2 gate oxide 10 nm; N+ poly-Si gate (phi_ms = -0.95 V, Q_f = 0). Gate radius R_g = 50 um, domain radius R = 200 um (>> 5 W_dmax). Gate sweep -2.0 V to +2.0 V over 81 points. C(V_g) is extracted in two ways by semi.cv: low-frequency C_LF = -dQ_s/dV_g via centered FD on the r-weighted total semiconductor charge (Hu Eq. 5.6.1); high-frequency C_HF via the depletion-approximation clamp (W_dep capped at W_dmax once phi_s >= 2 phi_B). Mesh is built from moscap_axisym.geo by gmsh and read via dolfinx.io.gmshio (the .msh is .gitignored, regenerate from the .geo).
